gist.headline: Terminal blossoms with Bloom CLI
gist.blurb: A new open-source terminal coding agent just dropped in the showcase. Bloom CLI brings multi-tool agent workflows straight to your command line, powered by our API.
gist.summary: Added Bloom CLI, an open-source terminal coding agent powered by the Pollinations API, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover and use a powerful new CLI tool for multi-tool agent workflows directly from their terminal.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'Bloom CLI', a terminal coding agent. 'Bloom' evokes flowers/plants. 'Terminal/CLI' evokes retro computers. The pollinations bee (Polly) interacting with a retro terminal that has a glowing flower blooming out of the screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny hacker glasses, typing on a retro computer terminal where a glowing digital flower is blooming directly out of the screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
